PARAM.description: the collectionBag must return a Bag that complies to the Collection contract
PARAM.assertion: assert receiverObjectID instanceof com.google.common.collect.Bag && receiverObjectID != null;
PARAM.name: collectionBag
PARAM.content: Factory method to create a bag that complies to the Collection contract

RETURN.description: Factory method to create a bag that complies to the Collection contract.
RETURN.content: Factory method to create a bag that complies to the Collection contract.

PARAM.description: the Bag contains all elements in the given collection, not respecting cardinality
PARAM.name: coll
PARAM.content:
(Change)
Returns true if the bag contains all elements in
the given collection, not respecting cardinality. That is,
if the given collection coll contains at least one of
every object contained in this object.

RETURN.description: (Change) Returns true if the bag contains all elements in the given collection, not respecting cardinality. That is, if the given collection coll contains at least one of every object contained in this object.
RETURN.content: (Change) Returns true if the bag contains all elements in the given collection, not respecting cardinality. That is, if the given collection coll contains at least one of every object contained in this object.

PARAM.description: the specified object must not be null
PARAM.name: object

RETURN.description: (Change) Adds one copy of the specified object to the Bag. Since this method always increases the size of the bag, it will always return true.
RETURN.content: (Change) Adds one copy of the specified object to the Bag. Since this method always increases the size of the bag, it will always return true.

PARAM.description: (Change) Removes the first occurrence of the given object from the bag.
PARAM.name: object
PARAM.content: (Change) Removes the first occurrence of the given object from the bag.

RETURN.description:
(Change) Removes the first occurrence of the given object from the bag.

This will also remove the object from the {@link #uniqueSet()} if the bag contains no occurrence anymore of the object after this operation.
RETURN.content:
(Change) Removes the first occurrence of the given object from the bag.

This will also remove the object from the {@link #uniqueSet()} if the bag contains no occurrence anymore of the object after this operation.

PARAM.description: remove all elements from the collection
PARAM.name: coll
PARAM.content:
(Change)
Remove all elements represented in the given collection, not respecting cardinality. That is, remove all occurrences of every object contained in the given collection.

RETURN.description: (Change) Remove all elements represented in the given collection, not respecting cardinality. That is, remove \all occurrences of every object contained in the given collection.
RETURN.content: (Change) Remove all elements represented in the given collection, not respecting cardinality. That is, remove \all occurrences of every object contained in the given collection.

PARAM.description: the collection to retain must be a Collection
PARAM.name: coll
PARAM.content: (Change) Remove any members of the bag that are not in the given collection, not respecting cardinality. That is, any object in the given collection coll will be retained in the bag with the same number of copies prior to this operation. All other objects will be completely removed from this bag.

RETURN.name: true
RETURN.content: if this call changed the collection
RETURN.description: if this call changed the collection

PARAM.description: the object must be an instance of java.lang.Object
PARAM.name: object

PARAM.description: the count must be a positive integer
PARAM.name: count
